name: @anatomy/cli
description: CLI for the Anatomy standard — validate, generate (Pass 1 deterministic + optional Pass 2 AI fill), show (--prose), migrate (v0.1 → v1.0), rehash (in-place fingerprint), explain. Manage paired .anatomy-memory entries (add, list, grep, show, stats, deprecate, thanks, credits). Serve as Claude Code SessionStart hook (anatomy hook) and stdio MCP server (anatomy mcp; 11 tools across section + memory access). Local-only telemetry with ANATOMY_TELEMETRY_DISABLE opt-out.
